ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was created */,
  "favorite_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been favorited */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been retweeted */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the tweet (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the tweet was posted */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the tweet (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* A calculated score based on engagement metrics */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user is a verified account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic (e.g., Healthcare, Infrastructure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent topic */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the topic is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_parent_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_topics" (
  "tweet_topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet-topic association */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_topics_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_topics_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User's permissions in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role in JSON format */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the role is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the comment */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the comment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet the like is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the like was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retweets" (
  "retweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each retweet */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet the retweet is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who retweeted the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the retweet was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)
